message:
test(runtime): Add E2E stuck detection test for deadline monitor

Adds comprehensive end-to-end test validating the deadline monitor's ability
to detect stuck tasks and emit appropriate warnings. The test verifies the
complete flow from task creation through checkpoint registration to warning
generation.

- Add deadline_monitor_e2e_stuck_detection test to lab runtime (+57 LOC)
- Expand deadline_monitor.rs with additional edge case coverage (+79 LOC)
- Verify warning emission includes correct task_id, reason, and checkpoint message
- Test NoProgress detection when tasks fail to make forward progress

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
